description: Košík.cz is an online grocery delivery service in the Czech Republic. Its site focuses on consumer shopping, and it also publishes an MCP endpoint for AI assistant integration.
summary: Košík.cz exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.kosik.cz/mcp-openai/`, authenticated with OAuth 2.0 via its well-known authorization server metadata; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain.
